article_title: C# Mediator 模式决策指南：什么时候该用，什么时候别用
core_theme: 判断 C# 项目里什么时候应该引入 Mediator 模式，以及什么时候应该保持直接调用或选择其他模式。
reader_takeaway: 读者能用组件数量、依赖形状、交互规则复杂度和替代方案来判断 Mediator 是否值得引入。
summary_angle: 把混乱的多对多依赖收束到一个协调点，同时提醒过度集中会变成过胖中介。

information_blocks.source_anchor: Signs Your Code Needs a Mediator / You Have Many-to-Many Dependencies Between Components
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧多个组件节点互相拉出混乱连接线，表示通信规则散落在对象之间。

information_blocks.source_anchor: A mediator collapses this N-to-N relationship into N-to-1
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中央协调塔把多条连接线收束成清晰的中心路由。

information_blocks.source_anchor: The Mediator Becomes a God Object
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中央 hub 旁边出现过载警示和堆叠规则块，提醒中介者会膨胀。

information_blocks.source_anchor: Mediator vs Alternatives: When to Choose What
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧用简洁分叉边界表示 Observer、Facade、Direct References 等替代选择。

main_metaphor: 软件组件里的空中交通控制塔
primary_subject: 由抽象代码块和连接端口组成的中央 mediator 协调塔
subject_action: 把左侧混乱依赖网重新路由成右侧有序通信路径
composition: 宽幅 2.35:1，中央主焦点，左侧混乱依赖网，右侧有序路径和替代模式边界
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: low-saturation arthouse illustration, quiet composition, subtle grain, muted colors, reflective emotional tone
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，本篇从风格池随机选中；决策指南适合用低饱和、克制的视觉语言表达判断边界。
style_safety_note: 该风格是泛视觉描述，不涉及特定品牌、工作室或在世艺术家复刻。
draft_goal: 验证主题、主隐喻、四个决策信息块和宽幅构图是否成立。
revision_targets: 如果文字过多，减少到 1-3 个短标签。
如果像真实 dashboard，改回抽象 editorial illustration。
如果中心 hub 抢掉所有信息块，强化左右冲突和解决关系。
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-diagram
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration that summarizes a C# Mediator pattern decision guide. Theme: deciding when Mediator is worth using in C# architecture. The reader should quickly understand that Mediator is useful when many components form tangled many-to-many dependencies, but harmful when it becomes unnecessary indirection or a god object.

Summary angle: turn a tangled component web into one focused coordination hub, while showing a clear boundary where direct references or Observer/Facade are simpler choices.
Narrative flow: conflict-to-resolution. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject and 3 supporting narrative beats. Each beat must map to the article's information blocks rather than generic decoration.
Information blocks:
- problem: source-grounded summary: many-to-many component references create dangerous refactoring and scattered interaction logic; visible label: "依赖成网".
- mechanism: source-grounded summary: Mediator collapses pairwise dependencies into N-to-1 coordination; visible label: "N到1".
- risk: source-grounded summary: a mediator with too many rules can become a god object; visible label: "过胖中介".
- contrast: source-grounded summary: Observer fits one-to-many notifications, Facade fits subsystem simplification, direct references fit stable one-to-one calls; visible label: "选对模式".

Main metaphor: an air-traffic-control style coordination tower made of clean software components, resolving a tangled network of colored connection lines into orderly routes.
Subject: one central mediator tower / hub made of abstract C# code blocks and connector ports, actively routing signals between modular components.
Composition/framing: wide 2.35:1, central focal hub, left side shows a messy compact web of component nodes, right side shows orderly routed paths and a small boundary marker for alternatives. Prefer horizontal storytelling that stays legible in a wide cover.
Style/medium: combine conceptual editorial illustration with low-saturation arthouse illustration: quiet composition, subtle grain, muted colors, reflective technical mood. Stylized, polished, editorial, visually strong, and clearly readable as an infographic-style summary cover. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: slate gray, muted teal, warm amber, off-white. Avoid a dominant purple-blue gradient or neon cyberpunk look.
Visible text policy: allow only these short Chinese labels: "依赖成网", "N到1", "过胖中介", "选对模式". No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels, no fake chart axes, no fake architecture node names.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics, no unrelated icon collage, no decorative clutter.
Avoid: generic robot character, code rain, neon city background, dense HUD overlays, real product screenshots, unreadable tiny text, fake analytics panels.
